decisions.reason: Each staged source folder is one physical document. The retired semantic-remediation rows modeled an embedded agenda/report mention as another canonical source with the same logical source_id. Their presented/prepared edges cannot truthfully be rebound to the containing minutes or exhibit book, so the dependent edges retire with the pseudo-sources. The underlying statements and evidence blocks remain in the retained staged source and other domain observations.
decisions.endpoint_rebase: The two retained physical-source relations for meeting_doc_121276 and meeting_doc_26831 use source-scoped local_observation_id endpoints in their accepted journals; projection deterministically resolves them to the retained unsuffixed source record after retirement.

decisions.reason: The later entity and located_in relation repeat the already reviewed Queens borough identity, Jamaica Bus Depot endpoint, source literal, date/status, and exact evidence block. Retiring the redundant pair preserves the earlier proof-backed entity and edge and removes the shared entity_queens alias ambiguity without an identity suppression.

Both records resolve to the same B&T-to-MTA distributes_income_to edge with the same assertion, date, and exact evidence identity. The retained record is the durable target of the existing review-state and endpoint corrections, so retiring the parallel row preserves correction provenance and the corrected canonical edge.

evidence.supported_fact: M16 was to be renamed M34A SBS on November 13, 2011; the source separately names predecessor and successor labels.
The same official transition statement supports the retained route_m16-renamed-to-m34a edge.
The same official transition statement supports the retained route_m16-related-to-m34a-sbs edge.

description: Formerly M16, renamed to M34A SBS for clearer passenger communication

Existing route on 34th Street, to be renamed M34A SBS for the 34th Street SBS project.

proposed_correction.reason: Preserve M16 as the reviewed historical predecessor and M34A SBS as the distinct successor. Remove successor-only route identity and service-variant surfaces from the M16 canonical payload while retaining transition descriptions and immutable accepted-journal provenance.
